[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001010100 3
1 001000010 2
2 100010010 3
3 011001110 5
4 011101101 6
5 011010110 5
6 001100010 3
7 100111010 5

01 10 011101111 7
12 21 011111111 8
23 32 011110110 6
34 43 101111010 6
45 54 101111110 7
56 65 101110110 6
67 76 101010010 4
70 07 111011110 7

02 20 011011110 6
13 31 011101111 7
24 42 111111110 8
35 53 101110110 6
46 64 101111010 6
57 75 101110110 6
60 06 011001110 5 match 3
71 17 111111111 a

03 30 011101110 6
14 41 111111111 a
25 52 111110110 7
36 63 001100010 3 match 6
47 74 100111010 5 match 7
50 05 111111110 8
61 16 011101111 7
72 27 111010110 6

04 40 111111110 8
15 51 111111101 8
26 62 011010110 5 match 5
37 73 101110010 5
